channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: What kind of waves are impossible to swim in?
item.description:
What kind of waves are impossible to swim in?
Microwaves.

item.title: Patient: Help me, Doc. I can’t remember anything for more than a few minutes. It’s driving me crazy! Doctor: How long has this been going on?
item.description:
Patient: Help me, Doc. I can’t remember anything for more than a few minutes. It’s driving me crazy! Doctor: How long has this been going on?
Patient: How long has what been going on?

item.title: Fran: The doctor told me to drink carrot juice after a hot bath. June: Do you like the carrot juice?
item.description:
Fran: The doctor told me to drink carrot juice after a hot bath. June: Do you like the carrot juice?
Fran: I don’t know yet. I’m still drinking the hot bath.

item.title: How did the police know the photographer was guilty?
item.description:
How did the police know the photographer was guilty?
They found his prints all over the scene of the crime.

item.title: What did the police officer say when he caught the woman who had stolen the office equipment?
item.description:
What did the police officer say when he caught the woman who had stolen the office equipment?
“Just give me the fax, ma’am.”

item.title: Matt: What happened to the robber who stole the lamp?
item.description:
Matt: What happened to the robber who stole the lamp?
Dave: Oh, he got a very light sentence.

item.title: A man traveling at 120 miles per hour on the interstate was stopped by highway police. “Sorry, Officer,” said the driver. “Was I driving too fast?"
item.description:
A man traveling at 120 miles per hour on the interstate was stopped by highway police. “Sorry, Officer,” said the driver. “Was I driving too fast?"
“No, sir. You were flying too low.”

item.title: Did you hear about the calendar thief?
item.description:
Did you hear about the calendar thief?
He got twelve months; they say his days are numbered!

item.title: Why would Snow White make a great judge?
item.description:
Why would Snow White make a great judge?
Because she is the fairest of them all.

item.title: Why did the dermatologist hurry to the jail?
item.description:
Why did the dermatologist hurry to the jail?
Everyone was breaking out.
